channel.title: Sexy on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Sexy on Have an average day :|

item.title: This is a classy gun!
item.description: [![This is one classy gun.](https://i2.wp.com/www.thehijax.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/11/xlDJ9.jpg?resize=770%2C514 "For my cake day...my favorite gun. ")](http://redd.it/qjyr6)This is one classy gun.I saw this post and fell in love with the picture. Then I saw this picture and promptly laughed my ass off. I love Reddit. [![my second favorite gun . my first is my nova tactical.](https://i0.wp.com/www.thehijax.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/11/oWyQE.jpg?resize=770%2C832 "my second favorite gun . my first is my nova tactical.")](http://www.reddit.com/r/guns/comments/qjyr6/for_my_cake_daymy_favorite_gun/c3y797u)my second favorite gun . my first is my nova tactical.
